arguments.template: {{ description }}
{{ description }}

<gl-shared-component-input-autocomplete-simple
  [class]="class"
  [value]="value"
  [listName]="listName"
  (currentValue)="onCurrentValue($event)"
  [id]="id"
  [itemContentAlignment]="itemContentAlignment"
  [placeholder]="placeholder"
  [listItems]="listItems"
  [disabled]="disabled"

  [custom]="custom"
  [baseUrl]="baseUrl"
  [valueField]="valueField"
  [textField]="textField"
  ><gl-shared-component-title-label-simple
    [id]="id"
    [labelAlignment]="labelAlignment"
    [labelValue]="labelValue"
    [required]="required"
    [class]="class"
    [requiredLabel]="requiredField"
  ></gl-shared-component-title-label-simple>
</gl-shared-component-input-autocomplete-simple>
{{option.text}}

arguments.template:
<gl-shared-component-navigation-tab-simple
  *ngFor="let tab of navigationTabs; let i = index"
  [tabEnabled]="tab.enabled"
  [tabSequence]="tab.sequence"
  [tabDescription]="tab.description"
  [tabActive]="tab.active"
  [showSeparator]="tab.showSeparator"
  [tabIsTheFirst]="tab.isTheFirst"
  [tabIsTheLast]="tab.isTheLast"
  [ngStyle]="{
    'z-index': tab.active ? 1000 : (100 - tab.sequence)
  }"
  [id]="'navigation-tab-' + tab.sequence"
  (mouseover)="tabHovering(true, tab.sequence, tab.active)"
  (mouseleave)="tabHovering(false, tab.sequence, tab.active)"
  (activate$)="activate($event)"
></gl-shared-component-navigation-tab-simple>
